pi_items.source: Task description requires 1 month caching, and verifier.py confirms this by checking for a value between 2000000 and 3000000 seconds (2592000 is exactly 30 days).
Task description requires 1 week caching, and verifier.py confirms this by checking for a value between 500000 and 700000 seconds (604800 is exactly 7 days).

Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly creates test files in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public to measure caching headers, and verified by checking the real Socioboard-4.0 git repository structure.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a real open-source Socioboard application instance where the target Apache web root is definitively located at /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public. The caching requirement claims of 2592000 seconds (1 month) for images and 604800 seconds (1 week) for CSS/JS exactly match the explicit ranges in verifier.py.
